{{CargoOrgan
|name=Frost Shard
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10674
|idx=31
|description=Jade-like scales shimmer with hypnotic brilliance, almost masking their origin: a branch of ancient dragon bloodline.
|skill=When attacked by the enemy, trigger the protection of the ice shield, reducing DMG by 18% of the enemy's ATK!
|hp=1032
|def=255
|atk=141
|rush=132
|gene1=Per purple or higher organ equipped, {race} DEF +10
Purple or higher Organs equipped: 7/7
|gene2=Per 5 Apostles defeated, {race} HP +200
Apostles Defeated: 15/15
|gene3=Water DMG +60
|gene4=Ignore Water RES +60
|gene7=Water DMG +180 (Awakened)
|}}
